title: The Giants Join the Breakthrough
description: Luffy pushes ahead toward Robin and CP9, leaving the larger Enies Lobby battle to the rest of the rescue force.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Luffy, Rob Lucci, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. Luffy pushes ahead toward Robin and CP9, leaving the larger Enies Lobby battle to the rest of the rescue force.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wait... that's not what you promised me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're clinging desperately to that hope...

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: ..... Rob Lucci, Recite the exact condition.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They sailed from water seven safely...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Shut up, you pieces of filth!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't give yourselves so much credit!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We tricked the pirates and caught them.

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: You're powerless before this great justice.

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: Haa... that looks like a dead end!!!

summary: Luffy pushes ahead toward Robin and CP9, leaving the larger Enies Lobby battle to the rest of the rescue force.
